drills.title: Subject Pronouns + Am/Is/Are
drills.instructions: हर sentence को ज़ोर से 3 बार बोलें। पहले धीरे, फिर normal speed, फिर confident speed.

sentences.english: I am a student.
sentences.hindi: मैं एक छात्र हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay am a stoo-dent

sentences.english: You are my friend.
sentences.hindi: तुम मेरे दोस्त हो।
sentences.pronunciation: yoo ar may frend

sentences.english: He is a doctor.
sentences.hindi: वह एक डॉक्टर है।
sentences.pronunciation: hee iz a dok-ter

sentences.english: She is very smart.
sentences.hindi: वह बहुत होशियार है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee iz veh-ree smart

sentences.english: It is a big house.
sentences.hindi: यह एक बड़ा घर है।
sentences.pronunciation: it iz a big howss

sentences.english: We are a happy family.
sentences.hindi: हम एक खुशहाल परिवार हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: wee ar a hap-ee fam-lee

sentences.english: They are good teachers.
sentences.hindi: वे अच्छे शिक्षक हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: thay ar good tee-cherz

sentences.english: I am not lazy.
sentences.hindi: मैं आलसी नहीं हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay am not lay-zee

sentences.english: She is not at home.
sentences.hindi: वह घर पर नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee iz not at hohm

sentences.english: We are not afraid.
sentences.hindi: हम डरे नहीं हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: wee ar not ah-frayd

drills.title: Simple Present — Daily Actions
drills.instructions: इन sentences को mirror के सामने बोलें। Verb पर ज़ोर दें।

sentences.english: I wake up at six every morning.
sentences.hindi: मैं हर सुबह छह बजे उठता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay wayk up at siks ev-ree mor-ning

sentences.english: She drinks tea every morning.
sentences.hindi: वह हर सुबह चाय पीती है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee drinks tee ev-ree mor-ning

sentences.english: He goes to the office by bus.
sentences.hindi: वह बस से ऑफिस जाता है।
sentences.pronunciation: hee gohz too thee of-is by bus

sentences.english: We eat dinner together.
sentences.hindi: हम साथ में रात का खाना खाते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: wee eet din-er too-geth-er

sentences.english: They play cricket on Sundays.
sentences.hindi: वे रविवार को क्रिकेट खेलते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: thay play krik-et on sun-dayz

sentences.english: My father reads the newspaper.
sentences.hindi: मेरे पिताजी अखबार पढ़ते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: my fah-ther redz the nooz-pay-per

sentences.english: The children go to school daily.
sentences.hindi: बच्चे रोज़ स्कूल जाते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: the chil-dren goh too skool day-lee

sentences.english: I study English every evening.
sentences.hindi: मैं हर शाम अंग्रेज़ी पढ़ता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay stud-ee ing-glish ev-ree eev-ning

sentences.english: She cooks delicious food.
sentences.hindi: वह स्वादिष्ट खाना बनाती है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee kooks dih-lish-us food

sentences.english: He works very hard.
sentences.hindi: वह बहुत मेहनत करता है।
sentences.pronunciation: hee wurks veh-ree hard

sentences.english: I brush my teeth twice a day.
sentences.hindi: मैं दिन में दो बार दाँत साफ करता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay brush my teeth twyce a day

drills.title: Introducing Yourself
drills.instructions: आप खुद को introduce कर रहे हैं। Confident voice में बोलें। Role-play करें जैसे आप किसी interview या नए school में हैं।

sentences.english: Hello, my name is Rahul.
sentences.hindi: नमस्ते, मेरा नाम राहुल है।
sentences.pronunciation: heh-loh, my naym iz rah-hool

sentences.english: I am from Delhi.
sentences.hindi: मैं दिल्ली से हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay am from del-ee

sentences.english: I am a software engineer.
sentences.hindi: मैं एक सॉफ्टवेयर इंजीनियर हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay am a soft-wayr en-jih-neer

sentences.english: I work at a tech company.
sentences.hindi: मैं एक tech कंपनी में काम करता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay wurk at a tek kum-pa-nee

sentences.english: I like reading books and listening to music.
sentences.hindi: मुझे किताबें पढ़ना और संगीत सुनना पसंद है।
sentences.pronunciation: ay lyk reed-ing books and lis-en-ing too myoo-zik

sentences.english: I am learning English to grow in my career.
sentences.hindi: मैं अपने करियर में आगे बढ़ने के लिए अंग्रेज़ी सीख रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay am lur-ning ing-glish too groh in my ka-reer

sentences.english: Nice to meet you.
sentences.hindi: आपसे मिलकर अच्छा लगा।
sentences.pronunciation: nyes too meet yoo

sentences.english: I have two brothers and one sister.
sentences.hindi: मेरे दो भाई और एक बहन है।
sentences.pronunciation: ay hav too bruth-erz and wun sis-ter

sentences.english: My hobby is playing cricket.
sentences.hindi: मेरा शौक क्रिकेट खेलना है।
sentences.pronunciation: my hob-ee iz play-ing krik-et

sentences.english: I am always eager to learn new things.
sentences.hindi: मैं हमेशा नई चीज़ें सीखने के लिए उत्साहित रहता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay am awl-wayz ee-ger too lurn nyoo thingz

drills.title: Question Forms — Do/Does
drills.instructions: पहले sentence सुनें (या पढ़ें), फिर उसके साथ-साथ बोलें। Question tone पर ध्यान दें — अंत में आवाज़ ऊपर जाती है।

sentences.english: Do you drink coffee?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम कॉफ़ी पीते हो?
sentences.pronunciation: doo yoo drink kof-ee

sentences.english: Does she work here?
sentences.hindi: क्या वह यहाँ काम करती है?
sentences.pronunciation: duz shee wurk heer

sentences.english: Do they speak English?
sentences.hindi: क्या वे अंग्रेज़ी बोलते हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: doo thay speek ing-glish

sentences.english: Does he eat non-vegetarian food?
sentences.hindi: क्या वह नॉन-वेज खाता है?
sentences.pronunciation: duz hee eet non-vej-ih-teh-ree-an food

sentences.english: Do you go to the gym?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम gym जाते हो?
sentences.pronunciation: doo yoo goh too the jim

sentences.english: Does your mother cook every day?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम्हारी माँ रोज़ खाना बनाती है?
sentences.pronunciation: duz yor muth-er kook ev-ree day

sentences.english: Do we have a meeting today?
sentences.hindi: क्या आज हमारी मीटिंग है?
sentences.pronunciation: doo wee hav a meet-ing too-day

sentences.english: Does it rain here in June?
sentences.hindi: क्या यहाँ जून में बारिश होती है?
sentences.pronunciation: duz it rayn heer in joon

sentences.english: Do you know his name?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम उसका नाम जानते हो?
sentences.pronunciation: doo yoo noh hiz naym

sentences.english: Does she have a car?
sentences.hindi: क्या उसके पास कार है?
sentences.pronunciation: duz shee hav a kar

sentences.english: Do your parents live with you?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम्हारे माता-पिता तुम्हारे साथ रहते हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: doo yor peh-rents liv with yoo

drills.title: Negative Sentences — Don't/Doesn't
drills.instructions: Mirror के सामने खड़े हों। हर negative sentence को confident और clear आवाज़ में बोलें।

sentences.english: I don't eat meat.
sentences.hindi: मैं मांस नहीं खाता।
sentences.pronunciation: ay dohnt eet meet

sentences.english: She doesn't like spicy food.
sentences.hindi: उसे तीखा खाना पसंद नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee duz-ent lyk spy-see food

sentences.english: He doesn't speak Hindi.
sentences.hindi: वह हिंदी नहीं बोलता।
sentences.pronunciation: hee duz-ent speek hin-dee

sentences.english: We don't watch TV at night.
sentences.hindi: हम रात को TV नहीं देखते।
sentences.pronunciation: wee dohnt woch tee-vee at nyt

sentences.english: They don't live in this city.
sentences.hindi: वे इस शहर में नहीं रहते।
sentences.pronunciation: thay dohnt liv in this sit-ee

sentences.english: I don't understand this question.
sentences.hindi: मैं यह सवाल नहीं समझता।
sentences.pronunciation: ay dohnt un-der-stand this kwes-chun

sentences.english: She doesn't come to class on time.
sentences.hindi: वह class में समय पर नहीं आती।
sentences.pronunciation: shee duz-ent kum too klass on tyme

sentences.english: He doesn't have a sister.
sentences.hindi: उसकी कोई बहन नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: hee duz-ent hav a sis-ter

sentences.english: We don't know the answer.
sentences.hindi: हमें जवाब नहीं पता।
sentences.pronunciation: wee dohnt noh thee an-ser

sentences.english: It doesn't matter to me.
sentences.hindi: मुझे कोई फ़र्क नहीं पड़ता।
sentences.pronunciation: it duz-ent mat-er too mee

sentences.english: I don't feel well today.
sentences.hindi: मैं आज ठीक नहीं हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay dohnt feel wel too-day

drills.title: Possessive Adjectives — My/Your/His/Her/Our/Their
drills.instructions: Possessive adjective पर stress दें। हर sentence में ownership express करें।

sentences.english: This is my bag.
sentences.hindi: यह मेरा बैग है।
sentences.pronunciation: this iz my bag

sentences.english: Your house is very beautiful.
sentences.hindi: तुम्हारा घर बहुत सुंदर है।
sentences.pronunciation: yor howss iz veh-ree byoo-tih-ful

sentences.english: His father is a police officer.
sentences.hindi: उसके पिताजी एक पुलिस अधिकारी हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: hiz fah-ther iz a poh-lees of-ih-ser

sentences.english: Her sister works in Mumbai.
sentences.hindi: उसकी बहन मुंबई में काम करती है।
sentences.pronunciation: her sis-ter wurks in mum-by

sentences.english: Its color is red and white.
sentences.hindi: इसका रंग लाल और सफ़ेद है।
sentences.pronunciation: its kul-er iz red and wyt

sentences.english: Our school is near the market.
sentences.hindi: हमारा स्कूल बाज़ार के पास है।
sentences.pronunciation: owr skool iz neer the mar-kit

sentences.english: Their children are very talented.
sentences.hindi: उनके बच्चे बहुत प्रतिभाशाली हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: thair chil-dren ar veh-ree tal-en-ted

sentences.english: My mother makes the best food.
sentences.hindi: मेरी माँ सबसे अच्छा खाना बनाती है।
sentences.pronunciation: my muth-er mayks the best food

sentences.english: Your English is improving every day.
sentences.hindi: तुम्हारी अंग्रेज़ी हर दिन बेहतर हो रही है।
sentences.pronunciation: yor ing-glish iz im-proov-ing ev-ree day

sentences.english: His dream is to become an IAS officer.
sentences.hindi: उसका सपना IAS officer बनना है।
sentences.pronunciation: hiz dreem iz too bee-kum an ay-ay-es of-ih-ser

drills.title: WH Questions — What/Where/When/Who/Why/How
drills.instructions: WH question बोलते समय sentence का अंत थोड़ा नीचे जाता है। WH word पर stress दें।

sentences.english: What is your name?
sentences.hindi: तुम्हारा नाम क्या है?
sentences.pronunciation: wot iz yor naym

sentences.english: Where do you live?
sentences.hindi: तुम कहाँ रहते हो?
sentences.pronunciation: wair doo yoo liv

sentences.english: When does the train arrive?
sentences.hindi: ट्रेन कब आती है?
sentences.pronunciation: wen duz the trayn ah-ryv

sentences.english: Who is your best friend?
sentences.hindi: तुम्हारा सबसे अच्छा दोस्त कौन है?
sentences.pronunciation: hoo iz yor best frend

sentences.english: Why do you study English?
sentences.hindi: तुम अंग्रेज़ी क्यों पढ़ते हो?
sentences.pronunciation: wy doo yoo stud-ee ing-glish

sentences.english: How do you come to school?
sentences.hindi: तुम स्कूल कैसे आते हो?
sentences.pronunciation: how doo yoo kum too skool

sentences.english: What do you eat for breakfast?
sentences.hindi: तुम नाश्ते में क्या खाते हो?
sentences.pronunciation: wot doo yoo eet for brek-fust

sentences.english: Where does she work?
sentences.hindi: वह कहाँ काम करती है?
sentences.pronunciation: wair duz shee wurk

sentences.english: Why doesn't he come to class?
sentences.hindi: वह class में क्यों नहीं आता?
sentences.pronunciation: wy duz-ent hee kum too klass

sentences.english: How often do you exercise?
sentences.hindi: तुम कितनी बार exercise करते हो?
sentences.pronunciation: how of-en doo yoo ek-ser-syz

sentences.english: Who teaches you English?
sentences.hindi: तुम्हें अंग्रेज़ी कौन पढ़ाता है?
sentences.pronunciation: hoo tee-chez yoo ing-glish

drills.title: Frequency Adverbs — Always/Usually/Often/Sometimes/Rarely/Never
drills.instructions: Frequency adverb पर extra stress दें। Feel करें कि कितनी बार वो action होता है।

sentences.english: I always brush my teeth before sleeping.
sentences.hindi: मैं सोने से पहले हमेशा दाँत साफ़ करता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay awl-wayz brush my teeth bih-for sleep-ing

sentences.english: She usually comes to work on time.
sentences.hindi: वह आमतौर पर काम पर समय से आती है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee yoo-zhoo-ah-lee kumz too wurk on tym

sentences.english: He often forgets his keys.
sentences.hindi: वह अक्सर अपनी चाबी भूल जाता है।
sentences.pronunciation: hee of-en fer-gets hiz keez

sentences.english: We sometimes eat out on weekends.
sentences.hindi: हम कभी-कभी weekends पर बाहर खाते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: wee sum-tymz eet owt on week-endz

sentences.english: They rarely miss a cricket match.
sentences.hindi: वे शायद ही कभी cricket match miss करते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: thay rair-lee mis a krik-et mach

sentences.english: I never drink alcohol.
sentences.hindi: मैं कभी शराब नहीं पीता।
sentences.pronunciation: ay nev-er drink al-koh-hol

sentences.english: My mother always wakes up early.
sentences.hindi: मेरी माँ हमेशा जल्दी उठती है।
sentences.pronunciation: my muth-er awl-wayz wayks up ur-lee

sentences.english: He usually reads before sleeping.
sentences.hindi: वह आमतौर पर सोने से पहले पढ़ता है।
sentences.pronunciation: hee yoo-zhoo-ah-lee reedz bih-for sleep-ing

sentences.english: I sometimes feel nervous while speaking.
sentences.hindi: मैं कभी-कभी बोलते समय घबरा जाता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay sum-tymz feel nur-vus wyl speek-ing

sentences.english: She never gives up.
sentences.hindi: वह कभी हार नहीं मानती।
sentences.pronunciation: shee nev-er givz up

sentences.english: They often travel during summer vacation.
sentences.hindi: वे गर्मियों की छुट्टी में अक्सर यात्रा करते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: thay of-en trav-el dyoo-ring sum-er vay-kay-shun

drills.title: At a Restaurant
drills.instructions: आप एक restaurant में हैं। Waiter से बात कर रहे हैं। Polite और clear English में बोलें।

sentences.english: Excuse me, can I see the menu?
sentences.hindi: माफ़ करिए, क्या मैं menu देख सकता हूँ?
sentences.pronunciation: eks-kyooz mee, kan ay see the men-yoo

sentences.english: What do you recommend?
sentences.hindi: आप क्या recommend करते हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: wot doo yoo rek-uh-mend

sentences.english: I would like a plate of biryani.
sentences.hindi: मुझे एक plate biryani चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: ay wood lyk a playt ov bir-yah-nee

sentences.english: Does this dish have onion?
sentences.hindi: क्या इस dish में प्याज़ है?
sentences.pronunciation: duz this dish hav un-yun

sentences.english: I don't eat spicy food.
sentences.hindi: मैं तीखा खाना नहीं खाता।
sentences.pronunciation: ay dohnt eet spy-see food

sentences.english: Can I have a glass of water, please?
sentences.hindi: क्या मुझे एक गिलास पानी मिल सकता है?
sentences.pronunciation: kan ay hav a glas ov waw-ter pleez

sentences.english: This food is very delicious.
sentences.hindi: यह खाना बहुत स्वादिष्ट है।
sentences.pronunciation: this food iz veh-ree dih-lish-us

sentences.english: Can I have the bill, please?
sentences.hindi: क्या मुझे bill मिल सकता है?
sentences.pronunciation: kan ay hav the bil pleez

sentences.english: Do you accept credit cards?
sentences.hindi: क्या आप credit card लेते हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: doo yoo ak-sept kred-it kardz

sentences.english: Thank you, the service is excellent.
sentences.hindi: धन्यवाद, service बहुत अच्छी है।
sentences.pronunciation: thank yoo, the sur-vis iz ek-sel-ent

drills.title: Describing Family Members
drills.instructions: अपने family members को describe करें। Mirror में खुद को देखें और confident बोलें।

sentences.english: My father is a government employee.
sentences.hindi: मेरे पिताजी सरकारी कर्मचारी हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: my fah-ther iz a guv-ern-ment em-ploy-ee

sentences.english: My mother is a homemaker.
sentences.hindi: मेरी माँ गृहिणी हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: my muth-er iz a hohm-may-ker

sentences.english: My brother studies in class ten.
sentences.hindi: मेरा भाई दसवीं कक्षा में पढ़ता है।
sentences.pronunciation: my bruth-er stud-eez in klass ten

sentences.english: My sister is a nurse.
sentences.hindi: मेरी बहन एक नर्स है।
sentences.pronunciation: my sis-ter iz a nurs

sentences.english: My grandfather tells great stories.
sentences.hindi: मेरे दादाजी बहुत अच्छी कहानियाँ सुनाते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: my grand-fah-ther telz grayt stor-eez

sentences.english: My grandmother wakes up very early.
sentences.hindi: मेरी दादीजी बहुत जल्दी उठती हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: my grand-muth-er wayks up veh-ree ur-lee

sentences.english: We are a family of five members.
sentences.hindi: हम पाँच सदस्यों का एक परिवार हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: wee ar a fam-lee ov fyv mem-berz

sentences.english: My uncle lives in Bangalore.
sentences.hindi: मेरे चाचाजी बैंगलोर में रहते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: my un-kul livz in bang-uh-lor

sentences.english: Her daughter is very intelligent.
sentences.hindi: उसकी बेटी बहुत बुद्धिमान है।
sentences.pronunciation: her daw-ter iz veh-ree in-tel-ih-jent

sentences.english: Their son is good at sports.
sentences.hindi: उनका बेटा खेलों में अच्छा है।
sentences.pronunciation: thair sun iz good at sports

drills.title: Articles — A, An, The
drills.instructions: Article पर ध्यान दें। A, An, The का सही प्रयोग सुनें और shadow करें।

sentences.english: I want to be an engineer.
sentences.hindi: मैं एक इंजीनियर बनना चाहता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay wont too bee an en-jih-neer

sentences.english: She has an honest nature.
sentences.hindi: उसका स्वभाव ईमानदार है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee haz an on-est nay-cher

sentences.english: He is a university professor.
sentences.hindi: वह एक university professor है।
sentences.pronunciation: hee iz a yoo-nih-vur-sih-tee pro-fes-er

sentences.english: The sun rises in the east.
sentences.hindi: सूरज पूरब में उगता है।
sentences.pronunciation: the sun ry-zes in thee eest

sentences.english: I read a book yesterday.
sentences.hindi: मैंने कल एक किताब पढ़ी।
sentences.pronunciation: ay red a book yes-ter-day

sentences.english: The book was very interesting.
sentences.hindi: वह किताब बहुत रोचक थी।
sentences.pronunciation: the book wuz veh-ree in-ter-est-ing

sentences.english: She is an actress.
sentences.hindi: वह एक अभिनेत्री है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee iz an ak-tres

sentences.english: I have a dog and a cat.
sentences.hindi: मेरे पास एक कुत्ता और एक बिल्ली है।
sentences.pronunciation: ay hav a dog and a kat

sentences.english: The dog is sleeping on the floor.
sentences.hindi: कुत्ता फर्श पर सो रहा है।
sentences.pronunciation: the dog iz sleep-ing on the flor

sentences.english: An apple a day keeps the doctor away.
sentences.hindi: रोज़ एक सेब खाओ, डॉक्टर से दूर रहो।
sentences.pronunciation: an ap-ul a day keeps the dok-ter ah-way

sentences.english: She is the best student in the class.
sentences.hindi: वह class की सबसे अच्छी छात्रा है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee iz the best stoo-dent in the klass

drills.title: Object Pronouns — Me/You/Him/Her/It/Us/Them
drills.instructions: Object pronoun पर stress दें। Sentence में subject और object की position notice करें।

sentences.english: Please help me.
sentences.hindi: कृपया मेरी मदद करें।
sentences.pronunciation: pleez help mee

sentences.english: I can see you from here.
sentences.hindi: मैं तुम्हें यहाँ से देख सकता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay kan see yoo from heer

sentences.english: She likes him a lot.
sentences.hindi: वह उसे बहुत पसंद करती है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee lyks him a lot

sentences.english: We call her every Sunday.
sentences.hindi: हम उसे हर रविवार को call करते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: wee kawl her ev-ree sun-day

sentences.english: He bought it from the market.
sentences.hindi: उसने इसे बाज़ार से खरीदा।
sentences.pronunciation: hee bawt it from the mar-kit

sentences.english: The teacher teaches us every day.
sentences.hindi: शिक्षक हमें हर रोज़ पढ़ाते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: the tee-cher tee-chez us ev-ree day

sentences.english: I know them very well.
sentences.hindi: मैं उन्हें बहुत अच्छी तरह जानता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay noh them veh-ree wel

sentences.english: My boss praises me often.
sentences.hindi: मेरे boss मुझे अक्सर तारीफ़ करते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: my bos prayz-ez mee of-en

sentences.english: She told him the truth.
sentences.hindi: उसने उसे सच बताया।
sentences.pronunciation: shee tohld him the trooth

sentences.english: They invited us to the party.
sentences.hindi: उन्होंने हमें party में बुलाया।
sentences.pronunciation: thay in-vy-ted us too the par-tee

drills.title: At School / College
drills.instructions: आप एक student हैं। Teacher से या classmate से बात कर रहे हैं।

sentences.english: Good morning, sir. May I come in?
sentences.hindi: सुप्रभात, sir। क्या मैं अंदर आ सकता हूँ?
sentences.pronunciation: good mor-ning sur, may ay kum in

sentences.english: I don't understand this problem.
sentences.hindi: मुझे यह समस्या समझ नहीं आई।
sentences.pronunciation: ay dohnt un-der-stand this prob-lem

sentences.english: Can you explain it again, please?
sentences.hindi: क्या आप इसे फिर से समझा सकते हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: kan yoo ek-splayn it ah-gen pleez

sentences.english: What is the homework for tomorrow?
sentences.hindi: कल का homework क्या है?
sentences.pronunciation: wot iz the hohm-wurk for tuh-mor-oh

sentences.english: I finished my assignment yesterday.
sentences.hindi: मैंने अपना assignment कल पूरा कर लिया।
sentences.pronunciation: ay fin-isht my uh-syn-ment yes-ter-day

sentences.english: Our exams start next Monday.
sentences.hindi: हमारी परीक्षाएँ अगले सोमवार से शुरू होती हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: owr ig-zamz start neks mun-day

sentences.english: I study for two hours every evening.
sentences.hindi: मैं हर शाम दो घंटे पढ़ता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay stud-ee for too ow-erz ev-ree eev-ning

sentences.english: She always gets good marks.
sentences.hindi: वह हमेशा अच्छे marks लाती है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee awl-wayz gets good marks

sentences.english: Do you have a pen I can borrow?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम्हारे पास एक pen है जो मैं ले सकता हूँ?
sentences.pronunciation: doo yoo hav a pen ay kan bor-oh

sentences.english: I want to become a doctor in the future.
sentences.hindi: मैं भविष्य में डॉक्टर बनना चाहता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay wont too bih-kum a dok-ter in the fyoo-cher

drills.title: Talking About Hobbies
drills.instructions: अपने hobby के बारे में बोलें। Enthusiastic और natural tone में practice करें।

sentences.english: My hobby is reading books.
sentences.hindi: मेरा शौक किताबें पढ़ना है।
sentences.pronunciation: my hob-ee iz reed-ing books

sentences.english: I enjoy playing cricket with my friends.
sentences.hindi: मुझे दोस्तों के साथ cricket खेलना अच्छा लगता है।
sentences.pronunciation: ay en-joy play-ing krik-et with my frendz

sentences.english: She loves painting and drawing.
sentences.hindi: उसे painting और drawing बहुत पसंद है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee luvz paynt-ing and draw-ing

sentences.english: He often listens to music while working.
sentences.hindi: वह काम करते समय अक्सर संगीत सुनता है।
sentences.pronunciation: hee of-en lis-enz too myoo-zik wyl wur-king

sentences.english: We sometimes go trekking on weekends.
sentences.hindi: हम कभी-कभी weekends पर trekking करते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: wee sum-tymz goh trek-ing on week-endz

sentences.english: I never miss watching a cricket match.
sentences.hindi: मैं कभी cricket match miss नहीं करता।
sentences.pronunciation: ay nev-er mis woch-ing a krik-et mach

sentences.english: Photography is my favorite hobby.
sentences.hindi: Photography मेरा पसंदीदा शौक है।
sentences.pronunciation: foh-tog-ruh-fee iz my fay-ver-it hob-ee

sentences.english: He usually goes cycling on Sunday mornings.
sentences.hindi: वह रविवार सुबह आमतौर पर cycling करता है।
sentences.pronunciation: hee yoo-zhoo-ah-lee gohz sy-kling on sun-day mor-ningz

sentences.english: Do you have any hobbies?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम्हारा कोई शौक है?
sentences.pronunciation: doo yoo hav en-ee hob-eez

sentences.english: Hobbies make our life more interesting.
sentences.hindi: शौक हमारी ज़िंदगी को और रोचक बनाते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: hob-eez mayk owr lyf mor in-ter-est-ing

sentences.english: I recently started learning to cook.
sentences.hindi: मैंने हाल ही में खाना बनाना सीखना शुरू किया।
sentences.pronunciation: ay ree-sent-lee star-ted lur-ning too kook

drills.title: Talking About the Weather and Nature
drills.instructions: Weather sentences को natural flow में बोलें। These are great conversation starters.

sentences.english: Today's weather is very pleasant.
sentences.hindi: आज का मौसम बहुत सुहाना है।
sentences.pronunciation: too-dayz weth-er iz veh-ree plez-ent

sentences.english: It rains a lot in Mumbai.
sentences.hindi: मुंबई में बहुत बारिश होती है।
sentences.pronunciation: it raynz a lot in mum-by

sentences.english: The sun is very hot in the afternoon.
sentences.hindi: दोपहर में धूप बहुत तेज़ होती है।
sentences.pronunciation: the sun iz veh-ree hot in thee af-ter-noon

sentences.english: It is cold in the mountains.
sentences.hindi: पहाड़ों में ठंड होती है।
sentences.pronunciation: it iz kohld in the mown-tenz

sentences.english: I love the smell of rain.
sentences.hindi: मुझे बारिश की खुशबू बहुत पसंद है।
sentences.pronunciation: ay luv the smel ov rayn

sentences.english: The flowers bloom in spring.
sentences.hindi: वसंत में फूल खिलते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: the flow-erz bloom in spring

sentences.english: It snows in Shimla in December.
sentences.hindi: दिसंबर में शिमला में बर्फ़ पड़ती है।
sentences.pronunciation: it snohz in shim-la in di-sem-ber

sentences.english: The wind is very strong today.
sentences.hindi: आज बहुत तेज़ हवा है।
sentences.pronunciation: the wind iz veh-ree strong too-day

sentences.english: I prefer cold weather over hot weather.
sentences.hindi: मुझे गर्मी से ज़्यादा ठंड पसंद है।
sentences.pronunciation: ay prih-fur kohld weth-er oh-ver hot weth-er

sentences.english: The sky is clear and blue today.
sentences.hindi: आज आसमान साफ़ और नीला है।
sentences.pronunciation: the sky iz kleer and bloo too-day

sentences.english: Farmers need rain to grow crops.
sentences.hindi: किसानों को फसल उगाने के लिए बारिश चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: far-merz need rayn too groh crops

drills.title: Object Pronouns in Action
drills.instructions: Object pronoun पर ज़ोर दें। हर sentence में clearly बोलें कि action किसके साथ हो रहा है।

sentences.english: She gave me a gift.
sentences.hindi: उसने मुझे एक उपहार दिया।
sentences.pronunciation: shee gayv mee a gift

sentences.english: I will call you tonight.
sentences.hindi: मैं तुम्हें आज रात call करूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: ay wil kawl yoo tuh-nyt

sentences.english: My mother loves him very much.
sentences.hindi: मेरी माँ उसे बहुत प्यार करती है।
sentences.pronunciation: my muth-er luvz him veh-ree much

sentences.english: Please wait for her outside.
sentences.hindi: कृपया उसका बाहर इंतज़ार करें।
sentences.pronunciation: pleez wayt for her owt-syd

sentences.english: She found it under the chair.
sentences.hindi: उसने इसे कुर्सी के नीचे पाया।
sentences.pronunciation: shee fownd it un-der the chair

sentences.english: The manager informed us about the meeting.
sentences.hindi: manager ने हमें meeting के बारे में बताया।
sentences.pronunciation: the man-ih-jer in-formd us ah-bowt the meet-ing

sentences.english: I recognized them immediately.
sentences.hindi: मैंने उन्हें तुरंत पहचान लिया।
sentences.pronunciation: ay rek-og-nyzd them ih-mee-dee-it-lee

sentences.english: Can you hear me clearly?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम मुझे साफ़ सुन सकते हो?
sentences.pronunciation: kan yoo heer mee kleer-lee

sentences.english: He thanked her for the help.
sentences.hindi: उसने मदद के लिए उसका शुक्रिया कहा।
sentences.pronunciation: hee thankt her for the help

sentences.english: Our principal called us to his office.
sentences.hindi: हमारे principal ने हमें अपने office में बुलाया।
sentences.pronunciation: owr prin-sih-pul kawld us too hiz of-is

drills.title: Possessive Adjectives — Ownership Sentences
drills.instructions: Possessive adjective और उसके बाद आने वाले noun पर ध्यान दें। Shadow करें और ownership feel करें।

sentences.english: My phone is not working.
sentences.hindi: मेरा फ़ोन काम नहीं कर रहा।
sentences.pronunciation: my fohn iz not wur-king

sentences.english: Your idea is really creative.
sentences.hindi: तुम्हारा विचार वाकई बहुत creative है।
sentences.pronunciation: yor y-dee-a iz ree-lee kree-ay-tiv

sentences.english: His job is very demanding.
sentences.hindi: उसकी नौकरी बहुत demanding है।
sentences.pronunciation: hiz job iz veh-ree dih-man-ding

sentences.english: Her handwriting is very neat.
sentences.hindi: उसकी लिखावट बहुत साफ़ है।
sentences.pronunciation: her hand-ry-ting iz veh-ree neet

sentences.english: Its engine is very powerful.
sentences.hindi: इसका engine बहुत शक्तिशाली है।
sentences.pronunciation: its en-jin iz veh-ree pow-er-ful

sentences.english: Our team won the competition.
sentences.hindi: हमारी team ने competition जीता।
sentences.pronunciation: owr teem wun the kom-pih-tish-un

sentences.english: Their house is next to the park.
sentences.hindi: उनका घर park के बगल में है।
sentences.pronunciation: thair howss iz nekst too the park

sentences.english: My sister is my biggest support.
sentences.hindi: मेरी बहन मेरा सबसे बड़ा सहारा है।
sentences.pronunciation: my sis-ter iz my big-est suh-port

sentences.english: Your hard work always shows.
sentences.hindi: तुम्हारी मेहनत हमेशा दिखती है।
sentences.pronunciation: yor hard wurk awl-wayz shohz

sentences.english: His salary is not enough for the rent.
sentences.hindi: उसकी तनख्वाह किराए के लिए काफ़ी नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: hiz sal-uh-ree iz not ih-nuf for the rent

sentences.english: Our country is known for its culture.
sentences.hindi: हमारा देश अपनी संस्कृति के लिए जाना जाता है।
sentences.pronunciation: owr kun-tree iz nohn for its kul-cher

drills.title: Negative Sentences — Don't for I/We/You/They
drills.instructions: Don't पर stress दें। Confident और firm voice में negative sentences बोलें।

sentences.english: I don't like crowded places.
sentences.hindi: मुझे भीड़ भरी जगहें पसंद नहीं।
sentences.pronunciation: ay dohnt lyk krow-ded play-sez

sentences.english: We don't have enough time.
sentences.hindi: हमारे पास पर्याप्त समय नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: wee dohnt hav ih-nuf tym

sentences.english: They don't come here anymore.
sentences.hindi: वे अब यहाँ नहीं आते।
sentences.pronunciation: thay dohnt kum heer en-ee-mor

sentences.english: You don't need to worry about it.
sentences.hindi: तुम्हें इसकी चिंता करने की ज़रूरत नहीं।
sentences.pronunciation: yoo dohnt need too wur-ee ah-bowt it

sentences.english: I don't remember his address.
sentences.hindi: मुझे उसका पता याद नहीं।
sentences.pronunciation: ay dohnt rih-mem-ber hiz uh-dres

sentences.english: We don't work on Sundays.
sentences.hindi: हम रविवार को काम नहीं करते।
sentences.pronunciation: wee dohnt wurk on sun-dayz

sentences.english: They don't believe in shortcuts.
sentences.hindi: वे shortcuts में विश्वास नहीं करते।
sentences.pronunciation: thay dohnt bih-leev in short-kuts

sentences.english: I don't agree with that decision.
sentences.hindi: मैं उस फ़ैसले से सहमत नहीं हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay dohnt ah-gree with that dih-siz-un

sentences.english: You don't have to shout.
sentences.hindi: तुम्हें चिल्लाने की ज़रूरत नहीं।
sentences.pronunciation: yoo dohnt hav too showt

sentences.english: We don't talk about personal matters at work.
sentences.hindi: हम काम पर निजी बातें नहीं करते।
sentences.pronunciation: wee dohnt tok ah-bowt pur-sun-ul mat-erz at wurk

sentences.english: I don't skip breakfast.
sentences.hindi: मैं नाश्ता कभी नहीं छोड़ता।
sentences.pronunciation: ay dohnt skip brek-fust

drills.title: Negative Sentences — Doesn't for He/She/It
drills.instructions: Mirror में खुद को देखें। Doesn't वाले sentences clearly और confidently बोलें।

sentences.english: She doesn't waste her time.
sentences.hindi: वह अपना समय बर्बाद नहीं करती।
sentences.pronunciation: shee duz-ent wayst her tym

sentences.english: He doesn't complain about anything.
sentences.hindi: वह किसी बात की शिकायत नहीं करता।
sentences.pronunciation: hee duz-ent kum-playn ah-bowt en-ee-thing

sentences.english: It doesn't work without electricity.
sentences.hindi: यह बिना बिजली के काम नहीं करता।
sentences.pronunciation: it duz-ent wurk with-owt ih-lek-tris-ih-tee

sentences.english: She doesn't talk to strangers.
sentences.hindi: वह अजनबियों से बात नहीं करती।
sentences.pronunciation: shee duz-ent tok too strayn-jerz

sentences.english: He doesn't drink tea or coffee.
sentences.hindi: वह चाय या कॉफ़ी नहीं पीता।
sentences.pronunciation: hee duz-ent drink tee or kof-ee

sentences.english: My friend doesn't use social media.
sentences.hindi: मेरा दोस्त social media use नहीं करता।
sentences.pronunciation: my frend duz-ent yooz soh-shul mee-dee-a

sentences.english: She doesn't want any help.
sentences.hindi: उसे कोई मदद नहीं चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: shee duz-ent wont en-ee help

sentences.english: The shop doesn't open on Sundays.
sentences.hindi: वह दुकान रविवार को नहीं खुलती।
sentences.pronunciation: the shop duz-ent oh-pen on sun-dayz

sentences.english: He doesn't tell lies.
sentences.hindi: वह झूठ नहीं बोलता।
sentences.pronunciation: hee duz-ent tel lyz

sentences.english: She doesn't like watching horror movies.
sentences.hindi: उसे horror movies देखना पसंद नहीं।
sentences.pronunciation: shee duz-ent lyk woch-ing hor-er moov-eez

sentences.english: The baby doesn't sleep during the day.
sentences.hindi: बच्चा दिन में नहीं सोता।
sentences.pronunciation: the bay-bee duz-ent sleep dyoo-ring the day

drills.title: Yes/No Questions — Do / Does / Is / Are
drills.instructions: Questions बोलते समय अंत में आवाज़ थोड़ी ऊपर जाती है। Shadow करें और intonation पर ध्यान दें।

sentences.english: Are you feeling okay?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम ठीक महसूस कर रहे हो?
sentences.pronunciation: ar yoo feel-ing oh-kay

sentences.english: Is she your colleague?
sentences.hindi: क्या वह तुम्हारी colleague है?
sentences.pronunciation: iz shee yor kol-eeg

sentences.english: Do they live near you?
sentences.hindi: क्या वे तुम्हारे पास रहते हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: doo thay liv neer yoo

sentences.english: Does he have any experience?
sentences.hindi: क्या उसे कोई अनुभव है?
sentences.pronunciation: duz hee hav en-ee eks-peer-ee-ens

sentences.english: Are your parents at home?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम्हारे माता-पिता घर पर हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: ar yor peh-rents at hohm

sentences.english: Do you enjoy your work?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम अपना काम enjoy करते हो?
sentences.pronunciation: doo yoo en-joy yor wurk

sentences.english: Is this the right bus?
sentences.hindi: क्या यह सही bus है?
sentences.pronunciation: iz this the ryt bus

sentences.english: Does she speak any foreign language?
sentences.hindi: क्या वह कोई विदेशी भाषा बोलती है?
sentences.pronunciation: duz shee speek en-ee for-en lang-gwij

sentences.english: Do we need to book in advance?
sentences.hindi: क्या हमें पहले से booking करनी होगी?
sentences.pronunciation: doo wee need too book in ad-vans

sentences.english: Are they happy with the result?
sentences.hindi: क्या वे result से खुश हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: ar thay hap-ee with the rih-zult

sentences.english: Is it too late to apply?
sentences.hindi: क्या apply करने में बहुत देर हो गई?
sentences.pronunciation: iz it too layt too ah-ply

drills.title: Asking for Directions
drills.instructions: आप एक नई जगह पर हैं और directions पूछ रहे हैं। Polite और clear English में बोलें।

sentences.english: Excuse me, where is the nearest bank?
sentences.hindi: माफ़ करिए, सबसे नज़दीकी bank कहाँ है?
sentences.pronunciation: eks-kyooz mee, wair iz the neer-est bank

sentences.english: How far is the railway station from here?
sentences.hindi: यहाँ से railway station कितनी दूर है?
sentences.pronunciation: how far iz the rayl-way stay-shun from heer

sentences.english: Does this road go to the hospital?
sentences.hindi: क्या यह सड़क hospital को जाती है?
sentences.pronunciation: duz this rohd goh too the hos-pih-tul

sentences.english: Is there a pharmacy nearby?
sentences.hindi: क्या पास में कोई pharmacy है?
sentences.pronunciation: iz thair a far-muh-see neer-by

sentences.english: Can you show me on the map?
sentences.hindi: क्या आप मुझे map पर दिखा सकते हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: kan yoo shoh mee on the map

sentences.english: I don't know this area at all.
sentences.hindi: मुझे यह इलाका बिल्कुल नहीं पता।
sentences.pronunciation: ay dohnt noh this air-ee-a at awl

sentences.english: Is the market on the left or the right?
sentences.hindi: बाज़ार बायीं तरफ़ है या दायीं?
sentences.pronunciation: iz the mar-kit on the left or the ryt

sentences.english: Thank you so much for your help.
sentences.hindi: आपकी मदद के लिए बहुत-बहुत धन्यवाद।
sentences.pronunciation: thank yoo soh much for yor help

sentences.english: Which bus goes to the city centre?
sentences.hindi: कौन सी bus city centre जाती है?
sentences.pronunciation: wich bus gohz too the sit-ee sen-ter

sentences.english: How long does it take to walk there?
sentences.hindi: वहाँ पैदल जाने में कितना समय लगता है?
sentences.pronunciation: how long duz it tayk too wok thair

drills.title: Common Verbs — Action Sentences
drills.instructions: हर sentence में verb पर stress दें। Action को feel करते हुए बोलें।

sentences.english: I read the newspaper every morning.
sentences.hindi: मैं हर सुबह अखबार पढ़ता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay reed the nooz-pay-per ev-ree mor-ning

sentences.english: She writes letters to her grandmother.
sentences.hindi: वह अपनी दादीजी को पत्र लिखती है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee ryts let-erz too her grand-muth-er

sentences.english: He runs five kilometres every day.
sentences.hindi: वह हर दिन पाँच kilometre दौड़ता है।
sentences.pronunciation: hee runz fyv kih-loh-mee-terz ev-ree day

sentences.english: We buy vegetables from the local market.
sentences.hindi: हम सब्ज़ियाँ local market से खरीदते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: wee by vej-tuh-bulz from the loh-kul mar-kit

sentences.english: She teaches mathematics at the school.
sentences.hindi: वह school में गणित पढ़ाती है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee tee-chez math-uh-mat-iks at the skool

sentences.english: I carry my ID card everywhere.
sentences.hindi: मैं अपना ID card हर जगह साथ रखता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay kar-ee my ay-dee kard ev-ree-wair

sentences.english: He sends emails to his clients daily.
sentences.hindi: वह अपने clients को रोज़ emails भेजता है।
sentences.pronunciation: hee sendz ee-maylz too hiz kly-ents day-lee

sentences.english: They repair mobile phones.
sentences.hindi: वे mobile phones ठीक करते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: thay rih-pair moh-bul fohnz

sentences.english: She listens carefully in class.
sentences.hindi: वह class में ध्यान से सुनती है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee lis-enz kair-ful-ee in klass

sentences.english: My father drives to work every day.
sentences.hindi: मेरे पिताजी हर दिन गाड़ी चला कर काम पर जाते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: my fah-ther dryvz too wurk ev-ree day

sentences.english: I keep my room clean and tidy.
sentences.hindi: मैं अपने कमरे को साफ़ और सुव्यवस्थित रखता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay keep my room kleen and ty-dee

drills.title: Shopping at a Store
drills.instructions: आप एक दुकान पर shopping कर रहे हैं। Shopkeeper से politely बात करें।

sentences.english: Do you have this in a larger size?
sentences.hindi: क्या इसका बड़ा size है?
sentences.pronunciation: doo yoo hav this in a lar-jer syz

sentences.english: How much does this shirt cost?
sentences.hindi: इस shirt की कीमत कितनी है?
sentences.pronunciation: how much duz this shurt kost

sentences.english: I am looking for a blue kurta.
sentences.hindi: मैं एक नीला kurta ढूंढ रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay am look-ing for a bloo kur-tah

sentences.english: Can I try this on?
sentences.hindi: क्या मैं इसे try कर सकता हूँ?
sentences.pronunciation: kan ay try this on

sentences.english: It doesn't fit me properly.
sentences.hindi: यह मुझ पर ठीक से fit नहीं होती।
sentences.pronunciation: it duz-ent fit mee prop-er-lee

sentences.english: Is there a discount on this item?
sentences.hindi: क्या इस चीज़ पर कोई discount है?
sentences.pronunciation: iz thair a dis-kownt on this eye-tem

sentences.english: I will take two of these.
sentences.hindi: मैं इनमें से दो लूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: ay wil tayk too ov theez

sentences.english: Do you accept online payment?
sentences.hindi: क्या आप online payment लेते हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: doo yoo ak-sept on-lyne pay-ment

sentences.english: Please give me a bag.
sentences.hindi: कृपया मुझे एक थैला दें।
sentences.pronunciation: pleez giv mee a bag

sentences.english: Thank you, I will come back again.
sentences.hindi: धन्यवाद, मैं फिर आऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: thank yoo, ay wil kum bak ah-gen

drills.title: Daily Vocabulary — Body and Health
drills.instructions: इन health और body-related sentences को clearly बोलें। These help in doctor visits and daily conversation.

sentences.english: My head is aching.
sentences.hindi: मेरे सिर में दर्द है।
sentences.pronunciation: my hed iz ay-king

sentences.english: I have a sore throat.
sentences.hindi: मेरे गले में खराश है।
sentences.pronunciation: ay hav a sor throht

sentences.english: She goes for a walk every morning.
sentences.hindi: वह हर सुबह टहलने जाती है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee gohz for a wok ev-ree mor-ning

sentences.english: He drinks eight glasses of water a day.
sentences.hindi: वह दिन में आठ गिलास पानी पीता है।
sentences.pronunciation: hee drinks ayt gla-sez ov waw-ter a day

sentences.english: I need to see a doctor.
sentences.hindi: मुझे doctor से मिलना है।
sentences.pronunciation: ay need too see a dok-ter

sentences.english: She takes her medicine on time.
sentences.hindi: वह समय पर अपनी दवाई लेती है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee tayks her med-ih-sin on tym

sentences.english: Exercise keeps us fit and healthy.
sentences.hindi: Exercise हमें fit और healthy रखती है।
sentences.pronunciation: ek-ser-syz keeps us fit and hel-thee

sentences.english: My back hurts after sitting for long.
sentences.hindi: लंबे समय तक बैठने के बाद मेरी पीठ दुखती है।
sentences.pronunciation: my bak hurts af-ter sit-ing for long

sentences.english: I feel much better today.
sentences.hindi: मैं आज बहुत बेहतर महसूस कर रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay feel much bet-er too-day

sentences.english: We should wash our hands before eating.
sentences.hindi: हमें खाने से पहले हाथ धोने चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: wee shood wosh owr handz bih-for eet-ing

sentences.english: Good sleep is important for health.
sentences.hindi: अच्छी नींद सेहत के लिए ज़रूरी है।
sentences.pronunciation: good sleep iz im-por-tent for helth

drills.title: WH Questions — How/What/Which/How Many
drills.instructions: इन practical WH questions को shadow करें। Question word पर stress दें।

sentences.english: How many brothers do you have?
sentences.hindi: तुम्हारे कितने भाई हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: how men-ee bruth-erz doo yoo hav

sentences.english: What time does the class start?
sentences.hindi: class किस समय शुरू होती है?
sentences.pronunciation: wot tym duz the klass start

sentences.english: Which subject do you like the most?
sentences.hindi: तुम्हें कौन सा subject सबसे ज़्यादा पसंद है?
sentences.pronunciation: wich sub-jekt doo yoo lyk the mohst

sentences.english: How much does this cost?
sentences.hindi: यह कितने का है?
sentences.pronunciation: how much duz this kost

sentences.english: What does your father do?
sentences.hindi: तुम्हारे पिताजी क्या काम करते हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: wot duz yor fah-ther doo

sentences.english: Which city do you live in?
sentences.hindi: तुम किस शहर में रहते हो?
sentences.pronunciation: wich sit-ee doo yoo liv in

sentences.english: How long does it take to reach there?
sentences.hindi: वहाँ पहुँचने में कितना समय लगता है?
sentences.pronunciation: how long duz it tayk too reech thair

sentences.english: What language does he speak at home?
sentences.hindi: वह घर पर कौन सी भाषा बोलता है?
sentences.pronunciation: wot lang-gwij duz hee speek at hohm

sentences.english: How often does she visit her parents?
sentences.hindi: वह अपने माता-पिता के पास कितनी बार जाती है?
sentences.pronunciation: how of-en duz shee viz-it her peh-rents

sentences.english: Which platform does the train leave from?
sentences.hindi: ट्रेन किस platform से जाती है?
sentences.pronunciation: wich plat-form duz the trayn leev from

sentences.english: How many people work in your office?
sentences.hindi: तुम्हारे office में कितने लोग काम करते हैं?
sentences.pronunciation: how men-ee pee-pul wurk in yor of-is

drills.title: Daily Vocabulary — Home and Surroundings
drills.instructions: घर और आस-पास की चीज़ों से जुड़े sentences बोलें। Simple और clear pronunciation पर focus करें।

sentences.english: Our house has three bedrooms.
sentences.hindi: हमारे घर में तीन bedroom हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: owr howss haz three bed-roomz

sentences.english: The kitchen is behind the living room.
sentences.hindi: रसोई, बैठक के पीछे है।
sentences.pronunciation: the kitch-en iz bih-hynd the liv-ing room

sentences.english: I always lock the door before sleeping.
sentences.hindi: मैं सोने से पहले हमेशा दरवाज़ा बंद करता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay awl-wayz lok the dor bih-for sleep-ing

sentences.english: She waters the plants every evening.
sentences.hindi: वह हर शाम पौधों को पानी देती है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee waw-terz the plants ev-ree eev-ning

sentences.english: My neighbour is very helpful.
sentences.hindi: मेरा पड़ोसी बहुत helpful है।
sentences.pronunciation: my nay-ber iz veh-ree help-ful

sentences.english: The electricity bill comes every month.
sentences.hindi: बिजली का बिल हर महीने आता है।
sentences.pronunciation: the ih-lek-tris-ih-tee bil kumz ev-ree munth

sentences.english: There are two fans and an AC in my room.
sentences.hindi: मेरे कमरे में दो पंखे और एक AC है।
sentences.pronunciation: thair ar too fanz and an ay-see in my room

sentences.english: We keep our shoes outside the door.
sentences.hindi: हम अपने जूते दरवाज़े के बाहर रखते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: wee keep owr shooz owt-syd the dor

sentences.english: The tap in the bathroom is leaking.
sentences.hindi: bathroom की नल से पानी टपक रहा है।
sentences.pronunciation: the tap in the bath-room iz leek-ing

sentences.english: I share my room with my brother.
sentences.hindi: मैं अपना कमरा भाई के साथ share करता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: ay shair my room with my bruth-er

sentences.english: Our colony has a park and a temple.
sentences.hindi: हमारी colony में एक park और एक मंदिर है।
sentences.pronunciation: owr kol-uh-nee haz a park and a tem-pul

drills.title: Making Plans with a Friend
drills.instructions: एक दोस्त के साथ plan बना रहे हैं। Natural और friendly English में बोलें।

sentences.english: What are you doing this Sunday?
sentences.hindi: इस रविवार तुम क्या कर रहे हो?
sentences.pronunciation: wot ar yoo doo-ing this sun-day

sentences.english: Do you want to watch a movie together?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम साथ में movie देखना चाहते हो?
sentences.pronunciation: doo yoo wont too woch a moov-ee too-geth-er

sentences.english: I don't have any plans yet.
sentences.hindi: अभी मेरा कोई plan नहीं है।
sentences.pronunciation: ay dohnt hav en-ee planz yet

sentences.english: Let's meet at the coffee shop at four.
sentences.hindi: चलो चार बजे coffee shop पर मिलते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: lets meet at the kof-ee shop at for

sentences.english: Which movie does he want to watch?
sentences.hindi: वह कौन सी movie देखना चाहता है?
sentences.pronunciation: wich moov-ee duz hee wont too woch

sentences.english: My sister doesn't like action movies.
sentences.hindi: मेरी बहन को action movies पसंद नहीं।
sentences.pronunciation: my sis-ter duz-ent lyk ak-shun moov-eez

sentences.english: We can go to the park instead.
sentences.hindi: हम इसकी बजाय park जा सकते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: wee kan goh too the park in-sted

sentences.english: Does the plan suit you?
sentences.hindi: क्या यह plan तुम्हें ठीक लगता है?
sentences.pronunciation: duz the plan soot yoo

sentences.english: I will call you before I leave.
sentences.hindi: जाने से पहले मैं तुम्हें call करूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: ay wil kawl yoo bih-for ay leev

sentences.english: Great, I am really looking forward to it.
sentences.hindi: बहुत अच्छा, मैं इसका बहुत इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: grayt, ay am ree-lee look-ing for-werd too it

drills.title: SVO Structure — Subject Verb Object Practice
drills.instructions: हर sentence में Subject, Verb, और Object clearly identify करें। SVO order feel करते हुए बोलें।

sentences.english: The boy kicks the ball.
sentences.hindi: लड़का गेंद को मारता है।
sentences.pronunciation: the boy kiks the bawl

sentences.english: My sister drinks milk every night.
sentences.hindi: मेरी बहन हर रात दूध पीती है।
sentences.pronunciation: my sis-ter drinks milk ev-ree nyt

sentences.english: The teacher explains the lesson.
sentences.hindi: शिक्षक पाठ समझाते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: the tee-cher eks-playnz the les-un

sentences.english: I enjoy my work.
sentences.hindi: मुझे अपना काम enjoy होता है।
sentences.pronunciation: ay en-joy my wurk

sentences.english: She visits her parents every month.
sentences.hindi: वह हर महीने अपने माता-पिता से मिलने जाती है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee viz-itz her peh-rents ev-ree munth

sentences.english: He uses the computer for his studies.
sentences.hindi: वह अपनी पढ़ाई के लिए computer use करता है।
sentences.pronunciation: hee yooz-ez the kum-pyoo-ter for hiz stud-eez

sentences.english: We respect our teachers.
sentences.hindi: हम अपने शिक्षकों का सम्मान करते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: wee rih-spekt owr tee-cherz

sentences.english: My friend knows three languages.
sentences.hindi: मेरा दोस्त तीन भाषाएँ जानता है।
sentences.pronunciation: my frend nohz three lang-gwij-ez

sentences.english: The company offers free training.
sentences.hindi: company मुफ़्त training देती है।
sentences.pronunciation: the kum-pa-nee of-erz free trayn-ing

sentences.english: She reads one book every month.
sentences.hindi: वह हर महीने एक किताब पढ़ती है।
sentences.pronunciation: shee reedz wun book ev-ree munth

sentences.english: I love my country.
sentences.hindi: मुझे अपने देश से प्यार है।
sentences.pronunciation: ay luv my kun-tree
